name: my-superpowers-md
description: Skill for creating or updating CLAUDE.md and AGENTS.md with evidence-first merge rules.

interface.shortDescription: Create or merge CLAUDE.md and AGENTS.md with stronger evidence-first rules.
interface.longDescription: Use this plugin when creating or updating repository instruction files such as CLAUDE.md or AGENTS.md, especially when existing guidance must be preserved and user-provided PDFs, original wording, and real data must outrank agent-authored rewrites.
defaultPrompt: Update this repository's AGENTS.md without overwriting existing repo-specific rules.
Merge my CLAUDE.md with the current repo instructions and preserve original wording.
Create a new AGENTS.md from the user's existing PDF and instruction notes.
